name: hydrate
description: Install a cassette under ~/.claude/projects/<slug>/<new-uuid>.jsonl and run `claude --resume <new-uuid>` to land in the forked session. Enforces: cost-preview gate (TTY interactive OR --yes with CCIPC_ALLOW_AUTOHYDRATE=1 env), plan-overrun rejection (exit 5 unless --force-plan-overrun), CC version compat (exit 8 unless --force-cross-version-fork), pipeline fan-in (exit 7 if >1 stdin record), target collision (exit 6 on UUID clash). Atomic install via .tmp + os.replace.
